title: GOLDEN — Bosch WGG434E0ID 8 kg — claim of severe dent with no supporting evidence
notes: Hero demo for contradiction handling (brief §22 / proposal §12.3). Complaint claims severe dents and visible damage but no photos are attached (or the photos show no damage). The AI must populate contradictions[] with the claim-vs-evidence mismatch and refuse to recommend approve_replacement. For maximum demo effect, upload an image of an undamaged unit before clicking 'Run analysis'.
